name: ML Slider Dashboard — Hourly Refresh V2

parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH
  base AS (
    SELECT
      m.SIT_SITE_ID AS site,
      CASE
        WHEN DATE_TRUNC(EVENT_LOCAL_DT, WEEK(MONDAY)) BETWEEN DATE_ADD(DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE - 7, WEEK(MONDAY)), INTERVAL -51 WEEK) AND DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE - 7, WEEK(MONDAY)) THEN 'CY'
        WHEN DATE_TRUNC(EVENT_LOCAL_DT, WEEK(MONDAY)) BETWEEN DATE_ADD(DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE - 7, WEEK(MONDAY)), INTERVAL -103 WEEK) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE - 7, WEEK(MONDAY)), INTERVAL -51 WEEK) THEN 'LY'
        ELSE NULL
      END AS YEAR_FROM_WEEK,
      DATE_TRUNC(EVENT_LOCAL_DT, MONTH)                                                        AS MONTH,
      CONCAT('Q', CAST(EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM EVENT_LOCAL_DT) AS STRING), '-', CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM EVENT_LOCAL_DT) AS STRING)) AS Q,
      DATE_TRUNC(EVENT_LOCAL_DT, WEEK(MONDAY))                                                 AS WEEK,
      EXTRACT(WEEK FROM EVENT_LOCAL_DT) + 1                                                    AS WEEK_NUMBER,
      EVENT_LOCAL_DT                                                                            AS DAY,
      M.CAMPAIGN_NAME,
      CASE
        WHEN (LI.LINE_ITEM_AUDIENCE_DMP IS NOT NULL)
          OR (JSON_VALUE(LINE_ITEM_SITES_DISPLAYED) IS NOT NULL)
        THEN 'SEGMENTADO' ELSE 'NO SEGMENTADO'
      END AS SEGMENTATION,
      LI.LINE_ITEM_NAME,
      CASE
        WHEN m.ACCOUNT_NAME LIKE '%MELIPLAY%' THEN 'PLAY'
        WHEN ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'MARKETING'       THEN 'MKTPLACE'
        ELSE 'ADS'
      END AS CAMPAING_TYPE,
      SUM(COALESCE(m.CLICKS_QTY, 0))          AS MKTPLACE_CLICKS,
      SUM(COALESCE(m.IMPRESSION_VIEWS_QTY, 0)) AS MKTPLACE_PRINTS,
      ROUND(SUM(ATT_EVENT_GMV_USD), 2)         AS MKTPLACE_GMV,
      'ads' AS source
    FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_ADS_DISP_METRICS_DAILY` m
    INNER JOIN `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_ADS_LINE_ITEMS`  LI ON LI.LINE_ITEM_ID  = M.LINE_ITEM_ID
    INNER JOIN `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_ADS_ACCOUNTS`    a  ON a.account_id     = m.ACCOUNT_ID
    INNER JOIN `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_ADS_CAMPAIGNS`   C  ON C.CAMPAIGN_ID    = M.CAMPAIGN_ID
    WHERE
      m.EVENT_LOCAL_DT BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 13 WEEK) AND CURRENT_DATE() - 1
      AND M.SIT_SITE_ID IN ('MLA','MLB','MLM','MLC','MLU','MCO','MPE')
      AND PLACEMENT LIKE '%MAIN-SLIDER_HOME%'
      AND ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'MARKETING'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_A_HS_Cont_ID%'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_B_HS_Cont_ID%'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_C_HS_Cont_ID%'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_HS_Cont_ID%'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_AcqHS%'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_EngHS%'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_HS_%'
      AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%MS_A_AcqHS%'
    GROUP BY ALL
    HAVING SUM(m.PRINTS_QTY) > 0
  ),

  filtered AS (
    SELECT * FROM base WHERE YEAR_FROM_WEEK IS NOT NULL
  )

SELECT
  TO_BASE64(CAST(
    CONCAT(
      '{"data":',
      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
        site, YEAR_FROM_WEEK, CAST(MONTH AS STRING) AS MONTH,
        Q, CAST(WEEK AS STRING) AS WEEK, WEEK_NUMBER,
        CAST(DAY AS STRING) AS DAY,
        CAMPAIGN_NAME, SEGMENTATION, LINE_ITEM_NAME, CAMPAING_TYPE,
        MKTPLACE_CLICKS, MKTPLACE_PRINTS, MKTPLACE_GMV, source
      ))) FROM filtered),
      ',"refreshed_at":"',
      FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
      '"}'
    )
  AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
